description: Use this API to return the complex bus mismatch at the bus with the largest MVA mismatch. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr, ibus, cmpval = maxmsm()

return_values.name: ibus
return_values.description: Bus number of the bus with the largest mva mismatch. (output).

error_codes.description: No error; ‘IBUS’, and ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ returned.
No in-service buses found; ‘IBUS’ of 0, and ‘P’ and ‘Q’ of 0.0 or ‘CMPVAL’ of (0.0,0.0) returned.
